title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF TRINIDAD, GUIUAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR

chunks.text:
H. No. 1597 / 48 OG No. 5, 1695 (May, 1952)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 690, May 09, 1952 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF TRINIDAD, GUIUAN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Talisay, Bagambang, Calamrisan, Lo-ok and Barawalti, are hereby separated from the barrio of Tubabao, Municipality of Guiuan, Province of Samar, and constituted as a separate and independent barrio to be known as the barrio of Trinidad, in the Municipality of Guiuan, Province of Samar.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, May 9, 1952.
